title: perezia recurvata subsp. triceps
intro: Perezia recurvata subsp. triceps, also known as Perezia triceps, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Perezia triceps include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat various conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Perezia triceps can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in folk medicine in its native regions.
